originalTitle: 1000 Players Simulate HUNGER GAMES in Hardcore Minecraft
content: On the Unstable SMP, over 1000 players have been captured and forced to fight inside the largest HUNGER GAMES arena on the server. This is the full story of what happened... 1000 Players Simulate HUNGER GAMES in Hardcore Minecraft Unstable SMP Members ➜ @wemmbumc ➜ @FlameFragsMC ➜ @ParrotX2 ➜ @Spokeishere possible spoilers below this point Features: @MapiccMc @jumperwho @DylPicklee @found2fast (twitch) @n3mtm3tr1x (https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC5kq0zgePrFAD0m1mHKbhmg ) & all the trusted members! music: Christopher Larkin Ivory / @ivoryfrill & @MythrodakTV DM DOKURO / @DMDOKURO Pascal Stiefel / @Plasma3Music Lena Raine / @LenaRaine C418 / @C418 Peter McConnell Tick Tock by Pascal Michael: A Hat in Time https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=As5j57PGviQ&list=RDAs5j57PGviQ&index=2 LEMMiNO - Blackout (BGM) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RsVVcsVDt-s CC BY-SA 4.0 This is a video on the Unstable Universe: a staged Minecraft server where Spoke, Wemmbu, FlameFrags, and ParrotX2 aim to tell the best stories possible. btw a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft. spoke
chineseTitle: | 1 | 0 | 0 | 0 | | 名 | 玩 | 家 | 在 | | H | a | r | d | c | o | r | e | | M | i | n | e | c | r | a | f | t | | 中 | 模 | 拟 | 饥 | 饿 | 游 | 戏 |
chineseContent: 在 Unstable SMP 中，超过 1000 名玩家被抓获并被迫在服务器上最大的 HUNGER GAMES 竞技场中战斗。 This is the full story of what happened... 1000 Players Simulate HUNGER GAMES in Hardcore Minecraft Unstable SMP Members ➜ @wemmbumc ➜ @FlameFragsMC ➜ @ParrotX2 ➜ @Spokeishere possible spoilers below this point Features: @MapiccMc @jumperwho @DylPicklee @found2fast (twitch) @n3mtm3tr1x (https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC5kq0zgePrFAD0m1mHKbhmg) 以及所有值得信赖的成员！ music: Christopher Larkin Ivory / @ivoryfrill & @MythrodakTV DM DOKURO / @DMDOKURO Pascal Stiefel / @Plasma3Music Lena Raine / @LenaRaine C418 / @C418 Peter McConnell Tick Tock by Pascal Michael: A Hat in Time https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=As5j57PGviQ&list=RDAs5j57PGviQ&index=2 LEMMiNO - Blackout (BGM) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RsVVcsVDt-s CC BY-SA 4.0 This is a video on the Unstable Universe: a staged Minecraft server where Spoke, Wemmbu, FlameFrags, and ParrotX2 aim to尽可能讲述最好的故事。顺便说一句，Unstable SMP 视频中讨论的许多游戏机制/故障/红石对于 Unstable SMP/Unstable Universe 来说都是独特的，并且两者都不会以相同的方式工作/在香草 Minecraft 中不存在。辐
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
